x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for CSM requires a dedicated plugin. Without it all Now Assist CSM AI capabilities are unavailable.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Now Assist for CSM (sn_csm_gen_ai) via sys_plugins_list.do. Confirm CSM Now Assist entitlement with your ServiceNow account team.
